name: LDI Learner Workspace
postCreateCommand: fab config set encryption_fallback_enabled true 2>/dev/null || true && git clone https://github.com/data-goblin/power-bi-agentic-development.git .pbi-plugins 2>/dev/null || true && echo '' && echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━' && echo '  ✅ LDI Learner Workspace ready' && echo '' && echo '  MCP servers:                /opt/ldi-mcp/' && echo '  Fabric CLI:                 encryption fallback enabled' && echo '  PBI Agentic Dev Skills/CLI:  .pbi-plugins/' && echo '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'
